title: CausalValidityCertificate
description: Terminal verdict object for a CRE experiment. Certifies whether a run's observed dynamics are causally complete under controlled intervention. Machine-verifiable.

prefix_end_ts.description: Timestamp of last shared event in prefix. All divergence occurs after this point.

fork_point_event_id.description: Event ID of the last shared prefix event (the fork anchor).

causal_verdict.description: CLOSED: IC >= 0.70 and ghost_mass <= 0.20. OPEN: partial causal coverage. CONTAMINATED: IC < 0.40 or ghost_mass > 0.40.

CCF_mean.description: Causal Closure Fidelity: (E_explained * IC) - ghost_mass, clamped to [0,1].

IC.description: Intervention Consistency: fraction of post-fork changes reachable via causal paths from the fork point.

ghost_mass.description: Fraction of post-fork changes outside the causal cone of the intervention. Should be ~0 for causally closed systems.

divergence.description: Structural comparison between base and test variant arcs.

event_seq_distance.description: Normalized Levenshtein distance on event_type sequences.

a_grammar_delta.description: A-grammar types present in one variant but not the other.
